📧 Email Templates

17 client-facing email templates in the user journey

Viewing Confirmed
When: Client books a viewing
Viewing Update
When: Viewing details change
Viewing Follow-Up
When: After viewing completed
Ready to Make an Offer?
When: Encouraging offer submission
Offer Submitted
When: Offer sent to seller
Offer Accepted
When: Offer is accepted
Offer Countered
When: Seller counters offer
Offer Rejected
When: Offer is rejected
Condition Reminder
When: Condition deadline approaching
Closing Day
When: Closing is imminent
Final Walkthrough
When: Final walkthrough scheduled
Keys Day
When: Closing complete
Review Request
When: Post-closing follow-up
New Listing Match
When: New property matches criteria
Search Update
When: Market update sent
Welcome Email
When: New client onboarded
Build Update
When: New build reaches milestone

🌐 Public Pages

4 public-facing portals for clients, builders, lawyers

Viewing Response Page
Client-facing feedback form
Build Portal (Client)
Public new build tracker
Builder Portal
Builder-facing progress updates
Stakeholder Portal
Lawyer/lender view of deal

Mobile Build Portal
